title: Street Surgeries | Graham Stuart MP
headings: h3: Graham Stuart MP for Beverley and Holderness
text_excerpt: Street Surgeries | Graham Stuart MP Skip to main content Graham Stuart MP Main navigation Home News Priorities My Views Street Surgeries About Me Contact Cost of Living Graham Stuart MP Street Surgeries Tweet What’s a Street Surgery? My Street Surgeries take place outdoors in towns and villages across Beverley and Holderness on Saturday mornings. They provide an informal opportunity for you to meet me and share a problem, and also to ask about the work I am doing on your behalf. You don’t need to make an appointment and our conversation will be private if necessary. Street Surgery times (unless stated otherwise): Beverley: 10am – noon Hedon and Withernsea: 10.30am – noon Walkington, Bilton, Aldbrough, Keyingham, Cherry Burton and Woodmansey: 11am - noon Street Surgery dates: Saturday 9th May - Outside Aldi, Withernsea Saturday 13th June - Aldbrough Saturday 27th June - Keyingham Saturday 4th July - Toll Gavel, Beverley Saturday 5th September - Outside Aldi, Withernsea Saturday 19th September - Market Place, Hedon Saturday 17th October - Cherry Burton Saturday 31st October - Woodmansey Saturday 14th November - Market Place, Hedon Saturday 28th November - Outside Aldi, Withernsea Saturday 12th December - Toll Gavel, Beverley Newsletter signup Leave this field blank Get Graham's monthly newsletter Your email First name Last name Postcode Address ID Address 1 The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy .
